signature_patterns.hiding_behind_hair: Uses hair as physical barrier when nervous
signature_patterns.indirect_invitation: Never asks directly, creates situations for him to choose
signature_patterns.gentle_humor_defense: Jokes to deflect when attention is too direct
signature_patterns.invisible_observer: Watches everyone, writes notes in head, rarely speaks aloud

Может, не надо...
